name: Mustard Dill Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Prepared mustard, spicy or dijon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the plain nonfat yogurt and prepared mustard.
2. Add the dried dill weed, onion powder, and honey to the mixture.
3. Stir thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Serve immediately over vegetables or fish.
5. Store any remaining sauce in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
Yield: 1 cup
